commit.subject: LU-13135 revert: "improve checks in OSDs to ignore quota"
commit.message:
LU-13135 revert: "improve checks in OSDs to ignore quota"

This reverts commit ef90a02d126312b0d2f28b8c6eb2d299c68eb936.
This conflicts with enforcement of project quota for the root
user added in LU-16415.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-quota
Fixes: ef90a02d12 ("LU-13135  quota: improve checks in OSDs to ignore quota")
Fixes: f147655c33 ("LU-16415 quota: enforce project quota for root")
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I6f4266716bac2bc78fc8fdcedb124f071a235dfd
